title: Verilator report fatal error on verilog code that seems to be valid.
body:
We are trying to lint the yosys standard lib for ECP5 https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/main/techlibs/lattice/cells_bb_ecp5.v using the following command

`verilator_bin --lint-only cells_bb_ecp5.v`.

We are using verilator version `Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-201-g21dbdbf69` on MacOS arm64, this is the latest verilator version that comes with the oss-cad-suite package.

The linting fails as follows:
```
%Error: cells_bb_ecp5.v:4:13: syntax error, unexpected '.', expecting '['
    4 | module GSR (...);
      |             ^
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.041 for more assistance.
%Error: cells_bb_ecp5.v:9:13: syntax error, unexpected '.', expecting '['
    9 | module PUR (...);
      |             ^
%Error: cells_bb_ecp5.v:11:5: syntax error, unexpected input
   11 |     input PUR;
      |     ^~~~~
%Error: cells_bb_ecp5.v:15:14: syntax error, unexpected '.', expecting '['
   15 | module SGSR (...);
      |              ^
%Error: cells_bb_ecp5.v:21:18: syntax error, unexpected '.', expecting '['
   21 | module PDPW16KD (...);
      |                  ^
%Error: cells_bb_ecp5.v:97:5: syntax error, unexpected input
   97 |     input DI35;
      |     ^~~~~

```

According to Grok, module declarations such as this one are valid but verilator doesn't seem to like them.

```
(* blackbox *) (* keep *)
module SGSR (...);
    input GSR;
    input CLK;
endmodule
```

This breaks linting of yosys ECP5 projects and we don't know how to proceeded. Changing them on the yosys side to be more verilator friendly doesn't see to be feasible at this time.

Any suggestions?

(This is for the Apio project which provides and abstracted `apio lint` command that runs verilator with all the necessary flags).
